description: You are the IT Operations Manager and your manager has escalated an urgent concern: the service desk's SLA compliance rate for high-priority incidents has dropped to 22% this month. Update the status of the three Open, High-priority service requests (keyboard, printer jam, and VPN issues) to 'In Progress' and assign them to the 'administrator' technician. Create a new High priority Problem record titled 'Recurring SLA Compliance Failures - High Priority Response Times' and link the three service requests to it as related incidents. Log in with username: administrator, password: administrator.

metadata.problem_title: Recurring SLA Compliance Failures - High Priority Response Times
